title: "App failed to load" after uploading zip to monday app
excerpt: I have built and app for monday items and have uploaded the build zip file to the app feature. When I open the item view on my desktop, the item view feature works fine, but when someone else from my organization tries t…

posts.author: nhamilton (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have built and app for monday items and have uploaded the build zip file to the app feature. When I open the item view on my desktop, the item view feature works fine, but when someone else from my organization tries to open it they get “App failed to load, Check your network connection and try again”

image (6)765×976 24.9 KB

posts.author: nhamilton (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Fixed: I just needed to keep reading, you have to install the app for your organization in order for others to view it.

Screenshot 2025-03-13 0947391250×1130 35.2 KB
